title: People

Members

Matteo Zanovello — Neurology Resident / Postdoc

title: Research
text:
We study transcript-level regulation using large-scale RNA-seq datasets.



We develop reproducible computational tools in R and bash.

title: Research
text:
We study transcript-level regulation using large-scale RNA-seq datasets.

title: Publications
text:

3. Chizari, S. et al. TDP-43 pathology induces CD8\(^{\textrm{+}}\) T cell activation through cryptic epitope recognition. (2025) doi:10.1101/2025.06.22.660773.
